mapper.select:
select su.*, su1.username as creator_name, su2.username as updater_name from sys_user su left join sys_user su1 on su1.id = su.creator_id left join sys_user su2 on su2.id = su.updater_id
and su.username like concat('%', #{params.username}, '%')
and su.status = #{params.status}
order by su.create_time desc
